abilities.name: Adornment of Combat
abilities.desc: By using his own blood, Gama is able to manufacture body makeup with various magical properties. When Gama covers himself with this makeup, his demonic energy increases, endowing him with enhanced speed and strength. Add 2d8 to all damage done

abilities.name: Shackle paint
abilities.desc:
By mixing his blood with paint, Greg transfers his energy into his opponent by layering the foe's body with his special makeup in the shape of an infinity symbol. This causes temporary paralysis to whatever body part in which the symbol is located, making the victim feel as though they are being weighed down. The target should roll a CONSTITUTION SAVING THROW. 
-value >17: SAVED
-value >12: one hand imobilized
-value >8: both hands imobilized
-value <8: snared

abilities.name: Thron whip
abilities.desc: every hit adds 1 bleeding stack. Trigger Seed of the Death Plant

abilities.name: Rose whiplash
abilities.desc: Swiftly slashes the whip in multiple directions.

abilities.name: Petals and Thorns
abilities.desc: Stretch out your hands and generate a whirlwind of razor-sharp rose petals materializing and then swirling around. If an opponent/attacker gets within 30ft range, the petals attack and rip them to shreds.

abilities.name: Seed of the Death Plant
abilities.desc: This is a small seed planted in the opponent's body. Target makes a constitution saving throw. On a fail the seed is successfully planted. After it has had enough time to secure its roots (2 turns) within the victim's body, the death plant bursts forth from within dealing 12+1d10 piercing damage. At the start of each round the oppnent rolls a constitustion saving throw to kill the plant. On a fail the target takes 1d8 poison damage.
